title: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
summary_full: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.
summary_public: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.

HU.label: positive
HU.evidence: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
